description_long: This is a classic camper van with a black exterior adorned with bold white skull graphics on the roof and front, giving it a distinctive, rebellious look. The van features rounded edges, a split windshield, and prominent side windows, typical of vintage Volkswagen camper designs. A colorful, rainbow-patterned awning is extended from the right side, supported by two wooden poles, providing shade and a pop of color. The wheels are stylized and slightly exaggerated, adding a playful, cartoonish touch to the vehicle. The camper sits on a hexagonal patch of brown ground, suggesting a temporary parking or camping spot. The overall design blends retro aesthetics with modern, eye-catching graphics and accessories.
description: A black vintage camper van with bold white skull graphics and a rainbow awning, featuring rounded windows and playful, stylized wheels.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black camper van with white skull graphics, three side windows, and the rainbow awning extended from the right.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the split windshield, large white skull on the hood, and the rainbow awning visible to the right.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the rear of the camper, the rainbow awning, and the back windows, with less detail on the front.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back window, the skull graphic on the roof, and the awning extending to the left.
attribute_window_configuration: three rectangular windows on each side, one large split front windshield, one rear window
attribute_door_placement: single entry door on the right side near the front, rear hatch door
